headline: Chip titan SK hynix raises $26.5 bn in blockbuster US listing
summary: South Korean chip giant SK hynix set pricing for its mega US listing on Friday, raising $26.5 billion as it takes advantage of the AI boom in what will be one of the world's biggest ever stock sales.The amount raised did not come close to the record $75 billion raised in SpaceX's IPO last month, which made founder Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.
